title: Perform advanced machining and blueprinting of engine components
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Perform advanced machining and blueprinting of engine components demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to blueprint engine

pcs.text: Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 Information is sourced, procedures and methods are analysed, and appropriate tools are selected for machining and blueprinting engines1.3 Tools and measuring equipment are selected and checked for serviceability 1.4 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed 1.5 Cylinder block and cylinder head are prepared for blueprinting according to safety and environmental requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 Information is sourced, procedures and methods are analysed, and appropriate tools are selected for machining and blueprinting engines1.3 Tools and measuring equipment are selected and checked for serviceability 1.4 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed 1.5 Cylinder block and cylinder head are prepared for blueprinting according to safety and environmental requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 Information is sourced, procedures and methods are analysed, and appropriate tools are selected for machining and blueprinting engines1.3 Tools and measuring equipment are selected and checked for serviceability 1.4 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed 1.5 Cylinder block and cylinder head are prepared for blueprinting according to safety and environmental requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to blueprint engine

elements.title: Measure components

pcs.text: Measurements, clearances and tolerances are sourced and interpreted from manufacturer and component supplier literature2.2 Components are measured and clearances and tolerances are calculated according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Measurements, clearances and tolerances are sourced and interpreted from manufacturer and component supplier literature2.2 Components are measured and clearances and tolerances are calculated according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Measurements, clearances and tolerances are sourced and interpreted from manufacturer and component supplier literature2.2 Components are measured and clearances and tolerances are calculated according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Measure components

elements.title: Machine components

pcs.text: Components are adjusted or machined to meet manufacturer and component supplier specifications according to workplace procedures and safety and environmental requirements, and following machinery safe operating procedures3.2 Dummy assembly of engine is performed as required and clearances and tolerances are calculated according to workplace procedures3.3 Further machining is carried out as required to achieve required clearances and tolerances3.4 Engine is assembled according to job requirements and clearances, and tolerances are calculated again3.5 Bright surfaces are treated with rust prevention solution and component is prepared for further process or storage according to workplace procedures3.6 Blueprinting schedule documentation is completed according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Components are adjusted or machined to meet manufacturer and component supplier specifications according to workplace procedures and safety and environmental requirements, and following machinery safe operating procedures3.2 Dummy assembly of engine is performed as required and clearances and tolerances are calculated according to workplace procedures3.3 Further machining is carried out as required to achieve required clearances and tolerances3.4 Engine is assembled according to job requirements and clearances, and tolerances are calculated again3.5 Bright surfaces are treated with rust prevention solution and component is prepared for further process or storage according to workplace procedures3.6 Blueprinting schedule documentation is completed according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Components are adjusted or machined to meet manufacturer and component supplier specifications according to workplace procedures and safety and environmental requirements, and following machinery safe operating procedures3.2 Dummy assembly of engine is performed as required and clearances and tolerances are calculated according to workplace procedures3.3 Further machining is carried out as required to achieve required clearances and tolerances3.4 Engine is assembled according to job requirements and clearances, and tolerances are calculated again3.5 Bright surfaces are treated with rust prevention solution and component is prepared for further process or storage according to workplace procedures3.6 Blueprinting schedule documentation is completed according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Machine components

elements.title: Complete blueprinting and machining process

pcs.text: Final inspection is made to ensure finished work complies with workplace requirements4.2 Work area is cleaned, waste and non-recyclable materials are disposed of, and recyclable material is collected4.3 Tools and equipment are checked and stored according to workplace procedures4.4 Workplace documentation is processed according to workplace procedures
